ops.title: cc-context P7: unify internal/web embedder onto the native model2vec engine
ops.description: internal/web still spawns uv/Python for its embedding (TestEmbedIntegration, EmbedModelID in internal/web/embed.go). Now that internal/semsearch/embed ships a resident model2vec WASM engine, unify internal/web onto it (or a shared embedder abstraction) to remove the last Python-for-embeddings path. Keep web-search parity tests green; verify uv is no longer spawned for embeddings (ps check). Follow-on phase from the native-search port (v0.30.0); not required for that feature.

ops.text: internal/web embeds via the native engine; no uv/Python spawn for web embeddings; web-search parity tests pass
